title: Current PriMock57 public API attempt

partialAggregate.note: Partial current public-path evidence only: 9/57 target cases scored, below the 30-case publishable threshold.

blocker: Latest public API retry selected 30 PriMock57 cases through https://scribe-bench.vercel.app. 9/30 selected cases are scored and 13/30 have generated notes. Provider rate limit stopped this attempt before the remaining selected cases could be scored. Blocked/errored cases: PM57-d1c03, PM57-d1c08, PM57-d1c12, PM57-d1c13, PM57-d1c14, PM57-d1c15; +15 more. Latest blocker: Rate limit exceeded: free-models-per-min.
next: Add OpenRouter credits, pass a non-capped local provider key with --key-env, or configure a faster second judge, then resume the cached run toward at least 30 completed PriMock57 cases before publishing any ranked current row.
unblockAsk: This is not a model result yet: 9/30 attempted cases and 9/57 target cases are scored. Have a non-capped provider key or credits? Keep the key in your shell, resume the public API runner, and publish aggregate scores only after at least 30 PriMock57 cases are scored.
resumeCommand:
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=...
npm run bench:public-api -- \
  --base-url https://scribe-bench.vercel.app \
  --dataset data/primock57/cases \
  --system openrouter-nemotron-3-ultra-public-api \
  --repeats 1 \
  --limit 30 \
  --timeout 240000 \
  --key-env OPENROUTER_API_KEY \
  --out leaderboard/_public-api-pending.json \
  --status-out site/current-run.json
rawNotesPolicy: Raw generated notes remain in the ignored local progress cache and are not committed.
